_doc: threejson-agent CLI/GUI. Copy to setting.json. Default: CLI -i/-o relative to cwd. To base CLI + Node workspace on repo root: set relativetRoot (relative to this file, e.g. ../..) and redirectRelative true. redirectRelativeWarn false suppresses stderr redirect notices.

_providerBaseUrlHints.chatgpt: Leave empty for https://api.openai.com/v1 or set explicitly.
_providerBaseUrlHints.deepseek: Leave baseUrl empty for default https://api.deepseek.com (JS bridge appends /chat/completions). Do not add /v1 unless your gateway requires it.
_providerBaseUrlHints.custom: OpenAI-compatible root URL, e.g. https://your-gateway.example/v1 — must match what your gateway expects before /chat/completions.
